name: RebarLegSurfaceObject
summary: The RebarLegSurfaceObject class represents a polymesh surface for generating rebar legs in a RebarSet.

constructors.name: RebarLegSurfaceObject
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the RebarLegSurfaceObject class.

methods.name: CompareTo
methods.summary: Compares Identifiers of model objects.

params.name: obj
params.doc: The model object to be used in comparison.

returns.doc: 0 if object Identifiers are the same, 1 if given object Identifier is bigger, -1 otherwise.

methods.name: Delete
methods.summary: Deletes the model object from the model database.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: Equals
methods.summary: Check if Identifiers of model objects are same.

params.name: other
params.doc: The model object to be used in comparison.

returns.doc: true if object Identifiers are the same, false otherwise,

methods.name: GetAllReportProperties
methods.signature: public bool GetAllReportProperties(ArrayList stringNames, ArrayList doubleNames, ArrayList integerNames, ref Hashtable values)
methods.summary: Retrieves all properties for the model object in one hashtable. Type for the returned value must be checked using type casting.

params.name: stringNames
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the string properties.

params.name: doubleNames
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the double properties.

params.name: integerNames
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the integer properties.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table list that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetAllUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all properties for the model object in one hashtable. Type for the returned value must be checked using type casting.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetChildren
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the children model objects.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator on success, otherwise null.

methods.name: GetCoordinateSystem
methods.summary: Returns the coordinate system for the given model object.

returns.doc: The coordinate system for the given model object.

methods.name: GetCustomObjectType
methods.summary: Gets custom object type name from an existing object.

returns.doc: Type name string, empty string if type is not set.

methods.name: GetDoubleReportProperties
methods.signature: public bool GetDoubleReportProperties(ArrayList names, ref Hashtable values)
methods.summary: Retrieves multiple double report properties for the model object. It is faster to fetch multiple properties at once.

params.name: names
params.doc: An array list containing the names of the properties.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetDoubleUserProperties
methods.summary: Retrieves all double properties for the model object.

params.name: values
params.doc: The return value, a hash table that contains all the values that were retrieved successfully.

returns.doc: True if at least one single property was retrieved successfully.

methods.name: GetDynamicStringProperty
methods.signature: public bool GetDynamicStringProperty(string name, ref string value)
methods.summary: Gets a dynamic string property from the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: GetFatherComponent
methods.summary: Returns the father component of the model object.

returns.doc: A base component on success, otherwise null.

methods.name: GetHierarchicObjects
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the connected hierarchic objects.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator on success, otherwise null.

methods.name: GetPhase
methods.summary: Retrieves the phase of the model object (the phase number, the phase name, the phase comment and whether the phase is the current one or not).

params.name: phase
params.doc: The returned phase.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: Insert
methods.summary: Inserts the leg surface object into the model database.

returns.doc: True if successful, otherwise false.

methods.name: Modify
methods.summary: Modifies the existing leg surface object in the model database to match the current one.

returns.doc: True if successful, otherwise false.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Selects the leg surface object from the model database. The identifier must be set.

returns.doc: True if successful, otherwise false.

methods.name: SetCustomObjectType
methods.summary: Sets a custom object type name for an existing object.

params.name: type
params.doc: The custom obect type name to set to the model object.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: SetDynamicStringProperty
methods.signature: public bool SetDynamicStringProperty(string name, string value)
methods.summary: Sets a dynamic string property for the model object.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the property to be set.

params.name: value
params.doc: The new value for the property.

returns.doc: True if the property was set successfully.

methods.name: SetLabel
methods.summary: Sets a label for an object when a new instance is created, this method must be called before Insert. The label is used in plug-ins for identifying the changed object in modification.

params.name: label
params.doc: The label to set to the model object.

returns.doc: True on success.

methods.name: SetPhase
methods.summary: Sets the phase of the model object.

params.name: phase
params.doc: The new phase. A phase with this phase's number must exist in the database.

returns.doc: True on success.

params.name: intValues
params.doc: The new values for the int properties.

properties.name: AdditionalOffset
properties.summary: Gets or sets the user defined offset of the rebar legs from the leg surface object.

properties.name: Class
properties.summary: Gets or sets the class of the surface object.

properties.name: CreateHoles
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether CreateHoles parameter of the surface object.

properties.name: Father
properties.summary: Gets or sets the father object of the surface object. The father can be set only before the Insert(), otherwise exception is thrown.

properties.name: IsUpToDate
properties.summary: Gets if the object does not have a modification which is not shared.

properties.name: LayerNumber
properties.summary: Gets or sets the layer number of the leg surface object.

properties.name: ModificationTime
properties.summary: Gets latest time of the object was modified or created.
properties.remarks: The returned time is time of history revision which the object belongs to. For Sharing it is WriteOut time, for multiuser is save time. If history it not written then this method returns null.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the surface object.

properties.name: Polymesh
properties.summary: Gets or sets the surface geometry brep.

properties.name: RebarSet
properties.summary: Gets or sets the RebarSet to which the leg surface object belongs.

properties.name: Type
properties.summary: Gets or sets the type of the surface object.
